name: Grilled Cheese Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup chopped green onions with tops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese and butter.
2. Add the cheese, onions, and garlic salt; mix well.
3. Spread the mixture on both sides of each slice of bread.
4. Wrap the loaf in a large piece of heavy-duty foil; seal tightly.
5. Grill, covered, over medium coals for 8-10 minutes, turning once.
6. Unwrap the foil; grill an additional 5 minutes longer.
